content:
MODULE: cosmos.automation.n8n_enhanced
FILE: cosmos/automation/n8n_enhanced.py (608 lines)
CATEGORY: automation

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Enhanced n8n Integration

"I've enhanced n8n with my patented cosmos improvements!"

Full n8n API integration for workflow creation, management, and execution.

CLASSES:
- N8nNodeType(Enum): Common n8n node types.
- N8nNode: n8n workflow node.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- N8nConnection: Connection between n8n nodes.
- N8nWorkflow: n8n workflow definition.
  Methods: def add_node(self, node: N8nNode)
  Methods: def connect(self, from_node_name: str, to_node_name: str, from_output: int=0, to_input: int=0)
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> 'N8nWorkflow'
- EnhancedN8nIntegration: Enhanced n8n integration for cosmos.

Features:
- Full CRUD for workflows
- Cred
  Methods: async def close(self)
  Methods: async def list_workflows(self, active: Optional[bool]=None, tags: List[str]=None) -> List[Dict[str, 
  Methods: async def get_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> Optional[N8nWorkflow]
  Methods: async def create_workflow(self, workflow: N8nWorkflow) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def update_workflow(self, workflow_id: str, workflow: N8nWorkflow) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def activate_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def deactivate_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> bool
